title: Dystopian Diaries
relevance_summary: AI-generated memes leading to market manipulation and governance attacks

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys or interacts with AI-generated meme contracts
prevention.trigger: DEPLOYMENT of contract with known AI-generated meme patterns or INTERACTION with such contracts

red_flags: Unusual token launches triggered by cryptic posts
monitoring_rules: Monitor for contract deployments and interactions with known AI-generated meme patterns
summary: AI-generated memes were used to trigger market manipulations and governance attacks, leading to significant financial and ethical implications.
